about.description: At Orr Roofing & Construction, we believe in quality craftsmanship and honest service. We take the stress out of home improvement with clear communication, upfront pricing, and guaranteed workmanship.

description: Orr Roofing & Construction specializes in residential and commercial roofing, plus full construction services. We handle everything from minor repairs to complete home renovations.

section.headline: Local Experts Committed to Quality Craftsmanship
section.description: We're a family-owned business with deep roots in the community, dedicated to honest work and lasting relationships.

ceo.name: Ryan Orr
ceo.title: Owner • Orr Roofing & Construction
ceo.alt: Ryan Orr - Owner, Orr Roofing & Construction
quotes: Orr Roofing was built on the values of hard work, integrity, and putting customers first. We treat every home like it's our own.
description: With over 20 years in the construction industry, Ryan Orr saw how many homeowners were overcharged or left with poor workmanship. He started Orr Roofing & Construction to provide honest, reliable service at fair prices.
Today, our team continues that mission—delivering top-quality roofing and construction with clear communication, no pressure, and work we're proud to stand behind.

section.headline: What Our Customers Say
section.description: Real feedback from homeowners who chose Orr Roofing & Construction.

testimonials.name: Linda
testimonials.text: Orr Roofing did a fantastic job on our new roof. The crew was professional, cleaned up everything, and finished ahead of schedule. Ryan walked us through the whole process and helped with our insurance claim. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Tom
testimonials.text: Had a leak during a storm and they came out the same day. Tarped it temporarily and came back the next week for permanent repair. Fair price and great communication.

testimonials.name: Rachel
testimonials.text: They built a beautiful deck for us. The team was respectful, cleaned up daily, and the quality is outstanding. We're already planning our kitchen remodel with them.

testimonials.name: David
testimonials.text: We use Orr Roofing for all our rental properties. Reliable, fair pricing, and they always show up when they say they will. Great partner.

testimonials.name: Jennifer
testimonials.text: From the free estimate to final cleanup, everything was professional. The new windows have made such a difference in our energy bills. Highly recommend Orr Construction.

section.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
section.description: Answers to common questions about roofing, construction, and working with our team.

items.question: How do I get a free estimate?
items.answer: Simply call us or fill out the form on this page. We'll schedule a time to inspect your property and provide a detailed, written estimate at no cost or obligation.

items.question: Are you licensed and insured?
items.answer: Yes! We are fully licensed, bonded, and insured. We carry general liability and workers' compensation insurance for your protection.

items.question: How long does a roof replacement take?
items.answer: Most residential roof replacements take 1-3 days, depending on size, complexity, and weather. We'll give you a clear timeline before starting.

items.question: Do you offer warranties?
items.answer: Yes. We offer manufacturer warranties on materials (20-50 years depending on product) plus our own workmanship warranty. Details provided with your estimate.

items.question: Do you help with insurance claims?
items.answer: Absolutely. We can inspect your roof for storm damage, document everything, and meet with your adjuster to ensure you get a fair claim settlement.

items.question: Do you offer emergency tarping?
items.answer: Yes, 24/7. If your roof is actively leaking or damaged, call our emergency line. We'll come out to tarp and stabilize until permanent repairs can be made.

items.question: Do I need to be home during the work?
items.answer: Not necessarily. Many customers give us access and we handle everything. We'll communicate daily and you can check progress online or by phone.

items.question: What areas do you serve?
items.answer: We serve Metro Detroit including Wayne, Oakland, and Macomb counties. Contact us to confirm if we cover your specific city.

items.question: Do you do commercial roofing?
items.answer: Yes! We handle flat roofs, TPO, EPDM, and metal roofing for commercial and industrial buildings.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept check, credit card, and financing options are available for qualified customers. We'll discuss payment terms in your estimate.

knowledgeCard.title: Still have questions?
knowledgeCard.description: Our team is ready to help with your specific roofing or construction needs.
